rulings.Case Title: FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY VS. ROBERT KEITH AMEETI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Discharge & Dismiss Stakeholder Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. Section 386(B); 386.5386.5; And For Attorney?S Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. Section 386.6
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2026. Line 1. PLAINTIFF FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY Motion To Discharge & Dismiss Stakeholder Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. Section 386(B); 386.5386.5; And For Attorney?S Fees And Costs Pursuant To Code Civ. Proc. Section 386.6 is GRANTED in part. Fidelity National Title Company is discharged from any and all liability relating to the $110,000 in funds deposited with the Court on June 9, 2022, pursuant to CCP sections 386(b) and 386.5. Fidelity is awarded $27,500 in reasonable attorney fees and $6,499.93 in costs. Plaintiff Fidelity National Title Complaint is hereby dismissed from this action with prejudice. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAURENCE F. NASEY VS. FELL HOLDINGS LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2026. Line 2. DEFENDANT WILLOW BRANCH RE HOLDINGS LLC Motion To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (Lis Pendens) is GRANTED. The Court does not find it more likely than not that the appellate court will reverse the judgment. (Amalgamated Bank v. Superior Court (2007) 149 Cal.App.4th 1003, 1013, 1016-1015.) Defendant is awarded $7,035.50 in attorney's fees. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: 2375 SAND CREEK LLC VS. SASHA GORIN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Conditional Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Or Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for June 11, 2026. Line 4. DEFENDANT SASHA GORIN, LILIANA SOCORRO MARTINEZ-LANDIN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Conditional Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Or Dismissal is DENIED. Motion is denied for independent reasons. There is no need to rule on the evidentiary objections therefore. Additionally, Plaintiff's request that this matter be heard by the Honorable Samuel K. Feng is denied, by Judge Feng. =(501/SKF) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
